content.description: Implemented assessment freshness invariants in audit-loop.sh: (1) added features_with_build set built from all Artifact<BuildResult> entries; (2) added invalidated_reqs priority bucket — a stale assessment is invalidated when a BuildResult exists for any requirement in the same feature and the projectCommit does not match HEAD; (3) reordered priority to missing > invalidated > stale; (4) added 30s idle sleep after dispatching stale assessments so at most one stale assessment is re-evaluated per idle period.
